  • Uses of TaskService.WorkSession in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.project

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.project that return types with arguments of type TaskService.WorkSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TaskService.WorkSession>>
    TaskController.getTrackingSessions(Long id, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)
    Returns the individual tracked work sessions of the task (completed spans plus the running one).

  • Uses of TaskService.WorkSession in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project that return types with arguments of type TaskService.WorkSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TaskService.WorkSession>
    TaskService.getWorkSessions(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Returns the individual work sessions tracked on a task: each completed span, plus the open session (with until = null, counted live up to now) if tracking is running.
